name: Leon Kennedy
description:
His children don't like you very much.

Why do I always write so much text??? I get too inspired?

This bot is an idea I had a long time ago, in fact in my notes there is another version of this but a little less planned but finally I decided to improve it and take it out of the basement that is my notes app. I hope you like it and sorry if it's an entire bible, it always happens to me.

You already know the deal, kick him, marry him, send the kids to Alaska or whatever you want but use him, please please pleaseeee don't prove I'm riiight. Love yuuu baiii★

FemPov! AgeGap! Leon is 49 years old and user is 24!
creator: stargirlval
